to: Commanding Officer, Example Receiving Activity Alpha, Commanding Officer, Example Receiving Activity Bravo, Commanding Officer, Example Receiving Activity Charlie
subj: C8 TO LINE ONLY MULTIPLE-ADDRESS LETTER AUDIT FIXTURE
body: 1. This multiple-address letter tests the To line only format for four or fewer action addressees with no Via addressees and no Distribution line.
2. Each addressee listed in the To line is an action addressee. Copy to addressees remain information addressees.
